Title: Query-conditioned learned memory MVP
Description: Implement and evaluate bounded semantic or episodic write read and eviction on top of an exact recent cache
Acceptance: Beat recent-only by at least 0.03 at matched bytes without reducing current-scene or rare-event quality
Notes: Matched-state native anchor gives every policy 8413328 bytes and removes raw replay; frozen learned reaches 0.510 versus 0.475 exact recent with +0.035 interval [0.000 0.070] p 0.0923 and is not superior to top-k or MMR; calibration-only rank-64 feature codec plus sparse residual evaluation is running
